project.name: Hero: FlowBoard: When Auth State Fights React State

data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, speech bubbles, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition filling the entire frame.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective color pops. A developer hunched over a laptop in a dim room with multiple terminal windows glowing. Code reflected in glasses. A password reset email notification floating in the air. React component tree tangled with auth tokens like twisted vines. Supabase logo partially visible. The vibe is frustrated but determined problem-solving at 2am.
